_comment: Mock CRM. Dates are relative to the build date (late June 2026). Risk is computed at runtime against the REAL today by mcp_server/crm_server.py::risk_assessment. By design there are 5 at-risk deals; ranked by value at risk the order is D-1002 ($120k), D-1006 ($75k), D-1009 ($54k), D-1011 ($40k), D-1003 ($32k). The rest look healthy. evals/expected.json encodes this as the golden answer the eval harness checks.

deals.name: Acme Corp - Platform Renewal
deals.notes: Sent redlined MSA; their legal is reviewing. Dana asked for the SOC 2 report to clear a security questionnaire - owe it to her by Friday.

deals.name: Globex - Data Warehouse Expansion
deals.notes: Proposal sent 3+ weeks ago with no reply. Tom said budget approval is pending with the CFO. Should check in and offer to present the ROI model to finance.

deals.name: Initech - Onboarding Add-on
deals.notes: Verbal yes on the add-on but the close date already slipped. Samir is waiting on updated pricing for 50 seats - that pricing sheet is the only thing blocking signature.

deals.name: Umbrella Health - Pilot
deals.notes: Demo went well. Lena is looping in her director next week. Next step is to schedule the technical deep-dive.

deals.name: Stark Industries - Seat Upsell
deals.notes: Order form sent and Will confirmed signature this week. Healthy - just monitor.

deals.name: Wayne Enterprises - Security Suite
deals.notes: Champion Bruce is sold, but procurement has gone dark for two weeks. Need to re-engage procurement and confirm the security review timeline.

deals.name: Hooli - Analytics Pilot
deals.notes: Intro call done and went well. Sending a tailored demo agenda for next week.

deals.name: Cyberdyne - Platform Migration
deals.notes: MSA is in legal review and on track. Sarah confirmed the migration timeline last week.

deals.name: Soylent Corp - Annual Renewal
deals.notes: Renewal quote sent. Dev was supportive then went quiet heading into quarter-end. Nudge him for signature before the renewal date.

deals.name: Pied Piper - Compression Add-on
deals.notes: Negotiating term length. Agreed to follow up right after their board meeting this week.

deals.name: Vandelay Industries - Pilot
deals.notes: Proposal stalled and the close date passed. Our champion changed roles - need to find the new economic buyer before this can move.

deals.name: Tyrell Corp - Expansion
deals.notes: Early-stage opportunity. Currently scoping requirements with Roy's team.
